note: Keys are the two archetype keys sorted lexicographically and joined by '|'. Each entry has 3 disambiguator questions chosen to discriminate that specific top-2 confusion. Loadings are 7-vectors aligned to the same axes order as loadings.json.

questions.prompt: The love story ends ambiguously. You want…

a.label: The ache of not-knowing

b.label: A small absurd grace note

questions.prompt: Production design that draws your eye:

a.label: A red dress disappearing around a corner in 1962 Hong Kong

b.label: A pastel hotel lobby with a clerk in a purple uniform

questions.prompt: When the film breaks your heart it should…

a.label: Take its time and never say the word out loud

b.label: Crack a joke on the way down

questions.prompt: Two hours of tension. You'd rather it come from…

a.label: A slow rot in the family home

b.label: A briefcase, a rooftop, a ticking clock

questions.prompt: After the credits you want to feel…

a.label: Vaguely unwell, like you saw something

b.label: Like you got off a rollercoaster grinning

questions.prompt: The villain works best when…

a.label: You're not sure what they are

b.label: You can clearly see what they want

questions.prompt: An hour in. The plot is still abstract. You're…

a.label: Engaged — let me work for it

b.label: Fine, as long as it *looks* this good

questions.prompt: The thing that pulls you in:

a.label: An idea I can chew on for a week

b.label: A frame I'd hang on the wall

questions.prompt: Sound design lands harder than plot. Reaction:

a.label: Cool — but where's the *idea*?

b.label: Honestly, that's enough for me tonight

questions.prompt: Slow drama, hushed voices. You want it set in…

a.label: A small American town in winter

b.label: A neon-lit apartment in 1960s Hong Kong

questions.prompt: Grief or longing — which is your home key?

a.label: Grief that doesn't lift

b.label: Longing for someone you never had

questions.prompt: The score is mostly…

a.label: Quiet piano, almost silence

b.label: A recurring orchestral motif in waltz time

questions.prompt: Fantastical worlds, your flavor:

a.label: Loud, fast, jokes flying, multiverses colliding

b.label: Quiet, drifting, the wind through old trees

questions.prompt: The hero's journey, please:

a.label: Five climaxes stacked end to end

b.label: One quiet step at a time

questions.prompt: When the film gets weird, it should be…

a.label: Weird AND hilarious AND devastating, all at once

b.label: Weird in the way old folktales are weird

questions.prompt: Style on full blast. Yours leans…

a.label: Nocturnal, synth-soaked, hands on the wheel

b.label: Daylit dollhouse, deadpan, hands in pockets

questions.prompt: Best frame in your favorite film is…

a.label: A long, slow elevator ride lit blood-red

b.label: Three characters posed center-frame, perfectly spaced

questions.prompt: Dialogue you'd quote back:

a.label: Five words, said while looking away

b.label: A baroque toast at a tiny banquet

questions.prompt: A family is falling apart on screen. The dread comes from…

a.label: The plain weight of grief, no monster needed

b.label: Something is wrong in this house and I don't know what yet

questions.prompt: Long takes of a parent's face. You want the camera to show…

a.label: Exhaustion no one will name

b.label: Eyes flicking to something in the corner

questions.prompt: By the end, the film has…

a.label: Refused to comfort you, but it stayed honest

b.label: Refused to comfort you, and broken the rules of the room

questions.prompt: Kinetic energy you crave:

a.label: A perfectly choreographed five-minute set-piece

b.label: A chaotic five-minute argument in a too-small room

questions.prompt: The lead character is…

a.label: Competent. Calm. Knows the move.

b.label: A mess. Sweating. About to make it worse.

questions.prompt: Camera you prefer:

a.label: Stable, wide, framed like an architect

b.label: Handheld, too close, breathing on the actor's neck

questions.prompt: The film's central image is something inexplicable. You want…

a.label: A theory I can puzzle out on the walk home

b.label: A feeling that won't let me sleep

questions.prompt: Body horror, science, or ritual — your wedge in?

a.label: The biology, the geometry, the math underneath

b.label: The ritual. The chant. The thing the family doesn't say.

questions.prompt: Ambiguous ending. You walk out…

a.label: Already drafting a Reddit post

b.label: Already checking the back seat of your car

questions.prompt: A long, dreamlike sequence. You'd rather it be…

a.label: A spirit world I've never seen before

b.label: A real city at 3am, every detail aching

questions.prompt: The story's emotional center is…

a.label: A child learning the rules of an old world

b.label: Two adults forbidden to say what they mean

questions.prompt: The music you'd carry home:

a.label: A piano theme that sounds like a folktale

b.label: A waltz that won't get out of your head
